title: Brainfile Ledger Record Schema
description: Schema for a single JSONL ledger record appended when a task is completed. Each line in logs/ledger.jsonl must validate against this object schema.

id.description: Task identifier (for example: task-1, epic-2, adr-3).

type.description: Document type for the completed item.

columnHistory.description: Ordered list of columns traversed before completion.

tags.description: Tag set captured from the task.

parentId.description: Parent item ID if the task is linked to another document.

filesChanged.description: Files created or modified while completing the task.

contractStatus.description: Final contract status, when a contract exists.

validationAttempts.description: Number of contract validation attempts before completion.

constraints.description: Constraints copied from the contract at completion time.

completedAt.description: When the task was completed and recorded in the ledger.

cycleTimeHours.description: Elapsed time between createdAt and completedAt in hours.

summary.description: Agent-written retrospective for what was completed.

subtasksCompleted.description: Number of subtasks marked complete at completion time.

subtasksTotal.description: Total number of subtasks defined at completion time.
